step: 2a — Worksite locations (spatial spine of member geography)

sources.query: nwr[brand="Menards"] in US area; out center
sources.note: Filtered to brand-tagged store footprints; entrances/HQ/venue records sharing the name string are excluded by the brand filter.
Point-in-block assignment, lat/lon → 2020 census block FIPS.

transformation: Geocoded each worksite to its 2020 census block. These blocks are the LODES work-end geographies (w_geocode) for Step 2b. A store's block is a fair proxy for its workers only because a big-box store dominates its block (METHODOLOGY.md Step 2, trap #2).
caveats: 0 worksite(s) failed block geocoding and were dropped.
OSM coverage is community-maintained; count (~2,000) is consistent with Home Depot's public US store count but is not an official roster.
